description_long: This is a bald adult male figure with a lean build, dressed in a fitted black shirt with three-quarter sleeves and tight blue pants. The shirt features a slightly angular, geometric design around the shoulders, giving a stylized, low-poly appearance. The arms are exposed from the elbows down, and the hands are relaxed at the sides. The figure wears black athletic shoes with white laces and soles, adding to a casual, urban look. The facial features are simplified, with a neutral expression and no visible facial hair. The overall appearance suggests a modern, active pedestrian suitable for city environments.
description: A bald adult male in a fitted black shirt, blue pants, and black athletic shoes, with a stylized, simplified build and neutral stance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bald head, angular black shirt, blue pants, and black shoes with white laces.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, arm, and the fitted nature of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, pants, and the back of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the pants.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted three-quarter sleeve shirt and tight pants with athletic styling
